assistant_tail: 我会直接解包并核对 closure-pack.zip：重点看 manifest/hash、actual deliverables、selected/excluded 文件、diff、测试输出、安全声明和 backfill 表述。

YAML
overall_judgment: blocked
reviewer_type: gpt
task_id: GROUP-01
evidence_pack_reviewed: true

blocking_issues:
  - issue_id: GROUP-01-BLOCKER-01
    title: "GROUP-01 测试虽然显示 passed，但测试函数大量 return tuple，未形成有效断言"
    evidence:
      - "TARGETED_TEST_OUTPUT.txt 显示 60 passed, 60 warnings"
      - "FULL_TEST_OUTPUT.txt / TEST_OUTPUT.txt 显示 170 passed, 81 warnings"
      - "warnings 类型为 PytestReturnNotNoneWarning"
      - "actual_deliverables/tests/test_dispatch_result_schema.py 中多个 test_* 函数使用 return True/False tuple，而不是 assert 或 pytest.raises"
    why_blocking: |
      这会导致 pytest 将测试视为通过，但测试逻辑本身没有真正断言失败条件。
      对 schema/policy contract backfill 来说，负向测试必须能真实 fail-closed。
      当前 “passed” 不能作为有效验收证据。

  - issue_id: GROUP-01-BLOCKER-02
    title: "BYPASS_CHECK_OUTPUT.txt 显示 BLOCKED"
    evidence:
      - "BYPASS_CHECK_OUTPUT.txt: BLOCKED: 2 bypass pattern(s) detected"
      - "命中路径: evidence_packs/dirty-worktree-review-20260607/untracked_selected/docs/submit_proposal_to_gpt.py"
      - "命中模式: sync_playwright, connect_over_cdp"
    why_blocking: |
      虽然该路径看起来属于被排除的 dirty review pack 内容，不在 GROUP-01 selected files 中，
      但当前 evidence pack 提供的 bypass check 结果是 BLOCKED。
      GROUP-01 不能在 bypass checker 阻断状态下 accepted。
      需要提供针对 GROUP-01 selected files 的 bypass pass 证据，或证明全局 pre-push gate 不会被该 excluded dirty review pack 阻断。

required_fixes:
  - "将 GROUP-01 的新增/回填测试从 return True/False tuple 改为真实 assert / pytest.raises 断言。"
  - "重新运行 GROUP-01 targeted tests，要求没有 PytestReturnNotNoneWarning；至少不能让 GROUP-01 新增测试继续 return 非 None。"
  - "重新运行 full tests，保留新的 FULL_TEST_OUTPUT.txt。"
  - "重新运行 bypass check，并提供 PASS 结果；如果全局 checker 因 excluded dirty review pack 阻断，则必须提供 staged-files-only / GROUP-01-selected-files-only 的 bypass PASS 证据，并说明全局阻断项未进入 GROUP-01 提交。"
  - "保留当前好的隔离证据：GROUP_01_SELECTED_FILES.txt、GROUP_01_EXCLUDED_FILES.txt、NO_HISTORICAL_EVIDENCE_MUTATION.txt、NO_WHOLE_DIRTY_TREE_COMMIT.txt。"
  - "重新生成 DIFF_GROUP_01.patch、CHANGED_FILES、PACK_MANIFEST 和 closure-pack.zip。"

review_findings:
  isolation_scope:
    status: mostly_pass
    rationale: |
      CHANGED_FILES_agent-acceptance.txt 和 DIFF_GROUP_01.patch 只覆盖 GROUP-01 相关的 contracts、policies、tests、fixtures 与 .ai/tasks/group-01-contract-backfill.yaml。
      未看到 runs/*/POST_REVIEW_ROUTE.json、HANDOFF_REPLY_V4.txt deletion、archive hooks、tools governance、memory outputs、paper validator residuals 进入 GROUP-01 diff。

  historical_evidence_protection:
    status: pass_for_selected_group
    rationale: |
      NO_HISTORICAL_EVIDENCE_MUTATION.txt 声明 PASS。
      REPO_STATUS 仍显示历史 evidence 和 HANDOFF_REPLY_V4.txt deletion 存在于 dirty worktree，但它们没有进入 CHANGED_FILES / DIFF_GROUP_01。
      这说明 GROUP-01 选择性隔离方向正确。

  not_summary_only:
    status: pass
    rationale: |
      evidence pack 包含 actual_deliverables 下的合同、policy、fixture、测试文件，以及 diff、changed files、测试输出和 manifest。
      该包不是 summary-only。

  backfill_nature:
    status: pass
    rationale: |
      CLOSURE_REPORT.md 标注 backfill: true，并说明这是 historical/backfill capability capture，不是全新 unrelated feature。

next_task_authorization:
  authorized: yes
  execute_immediately: yes
  ask_before_starting: no
  recommended_task_id: GROUP-01-R2
  scope: "只修复测试断言有效性与 bypass PASS 证据，不扩大 GROUP-01 文件范围。"

END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE

我会按 R2 阻塞项逐项核验：先检查 ZIP/manifest 与文件范围，再看测试文件是否改成真实断言、测试输出是否消除 GROUP-01 的 return warning，最后核对 bypass 是否 scoped PASS。

消息发送超时，请重试。

closure-pack.zip
压缩归档
﻿Please review the attached GROUP-01 evidence pack R2.

Review focus:
- Verify this pack isolates only GROUP-01 files from the dirty worktree.
- Verify no whole-dirty-tree staging/commit is implied.
- Verify no historical evidence mutation is included: no runs/*/POST_REVIEW_ROUTE.json changes and no HANDOFF_REPLY_V4.txt deletion.
- Verify archive hook changes, tools governance changes, memory outputs, paper validator residuals, tmp/cache noise, and root scratch files are excluded.
- Verify targeted GROUP-01 tests now use real assertions and no longer produce PytestReturnNotNoneWarning in GROUP-01 test files.
- Verify full tests pass; note any remaining warnings are outside GROUP-01 scope.
- Verify bypass evidence is PASS for GROUP-01 selected files and scoped appropriately.
- Verify the pack is not summary-only and includes actual deliverables.
- Verify the backfill nature is clearly stated and not misrepresented as a new feature.

Return structured output:
overall_judgment: accepted|blocked
reviewer_type: gpt
task_id: GROUP-01
evidence_pack_reviewed: true
blocking_issues: []
required_fixes: []
next_task_authorization:
  authorized: yes|no
  execute_immediately: yes|no
  ask_before_starting: yes|no

End with END_OF_GPT_RESPONSE.
